VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: Both benchmark suites completed successfully with exit code 0. run_benchmarks.py: All 10 scenarios (Simple String Match, Case-Insensitive, Regex, Invert, Count, Context Lines, Max Count, File Glob, Word Boundary, Fixed Strings) passed parity checks against ripgrep with zero failures. run_hot_query_benchmarks.py: Both hot-query paths (repeated_fixed_string via StringZilla, repeated_regex_prefilter via CPU backend) completed successfully, demonstrating expected cache acceleration on second queries (StringZilla: 0.278s -> 0.004s, CPU regex: 0.288s -> 0.139s). No GPU paths were tested (no GPU available) — this is expected infrastructure limitation, not a regression.

frictions.description: run_hot_query_benchmarks.py requires PYTHONPATH=src to be set when run directly with python (not via uv run), as top-level imports reference tensor_grep modules
frictions.resolution: Used cmd /c with PYTHONPATH=C:\dev\projects\tensor-grep\src set before invocation
